infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Take Me Pic uses your location to find photographers nearby and only during an active session.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take Me Pic uses the camera to capture photos during a session.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Take Me Pic accesses your photo library to share and save photos from your sessions.

plugins.locationPermission: Take Me Pic utilise ta position pour trouver des photographes à proximité, uniquement pendant une session active.
